title: Designing a Resource Allocation Framework
scenario: Create a resource allocation framework for a team of software developers working on multiple projects. The framework should allocate team members to tasks based on their expertise, availability, and past performance. The final output should be a JSON object with the optimal task assignments for each team member.
constraints: Must include a detailed explanation of the algorithm used to generate task assignments.
Must provide a clear description of how team member expertise and availability were considered.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the algorithm used to generate task assignments is clearly described and relevant to the task.
Verify that a clear description of how team member expertise and availability were considered is provided.
Check if the JSON object is correctly formatted and easy to read.
Verify that the task assignments for each team member are correctly generated and make sense in the context of the team.
